summary: FASE 2 (Sezioni Personalizzate Clienti) testing completed. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements working correctly - Tabs (Campi/Sezioni), section CRUD, field-section assignment. One minor backend limitation identified: section_id cannot be set to null via PUT (filtered out).

minor.issue: Cannot set section_id to null via PUT - backend filters out None values in update_dict (line 6426). Fields can only be moved between sections, not removed from sections via API. DELETE section endpoint correctly handles this by setting section_id to null.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed (same as FASE 1)

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix backend PUT /api/cliente-custom-fields to allow setting section_id to null (modify line 6426 to handle section_id specially)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend update logic at line 6426 filters out None values, preventing section_id from being set to null. Consider using exclude_unset=True or special handling for nullable fields.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_Sezione_Playwright section during frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: FASE 2 (Custom Sections) fully implemented and tested. Backend CRUD at /api/cliente-custom-sections works. Frontend admin page has Tabs (Campi/Sezioni). Section creation dialog has data-testid attributes: section-commessa-select, section-tipologia-select, section-name-input, section-icon-input, save-section-btn. Section rows have data-testid='custom-section-row-{id}'. DELETE section correctly sets section_id to null on associated fields.

backend.POST /api/cliente-custom-sections: PASS - Admin can create, non-admin gets 401/403
backend.GET /api/cliente-custom-sections: PASS - Filters by commessa_id and tipologia_contratto_id work
backend.DELETE /api/cliente-custom-sections/{id}: PASS - Deletes section, sets section_id to null on associated fields
backend.ClienteCustomField with section_id: PASS - POST/PUT accepts section_id, field correctly assigned to section
backend.section_id update between sections: PASS - Can move field from one section to another

frontend.section dialog fields: PASS - All fields present (commessa, tipologia, name, icon)
frontend.section creation: PASS - Section created and appears in list with data-testid='custom-section-row-{id}'
frontend.field section badge: PASS - Fields show '📁 {section name}' or '📁 — (Campi Aggiuntivi)' badge
frontend.field-section-select in field dialog: PASS - data-testid='field-section-select' present, shows available sections
